response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with C++ and has worked on various software projects, but lacks direct experience in the specific industry and some key technologies mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Experience with C++ and other programming languages
Strong background in software development and testing
Experience with various technologies and frameworks
concerns: Lack of direct experience in automation machinery manufacturing industry
Limited experience with cloud platform solutions and specific protocols mentioned
No direct mention of experience with Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards
